apps.name: ZK Freighter
apps.subtitle: Shielded XLM & USDC payments on Stellar.
apps.localizedDescription: A privacy-by-default, self-custody wallet for shielded XLM and USDC payments on Stellar. Zero-knowledge proofs are generated on your device and verified on-chain; balances, amounts, and counterparties stay inside the pool. Shield in, send privately, unshield out — with every public boundary named. Early, unaudited software; testnet recommended.

versions.localizedDescription: First AltStore build. Shielded XLM & USDC on Stellar testnet.
